Demonstration app for crash scenarios on Pebble firmware, with build scripts and metadata files.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Demonstration app for triggering various crash scenarios on Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies to ignore build generated files in version control.
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the "Crash Test" app in the Pebble firmware, including version and platform details.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling a Pebble project with options for app and worker binaries.
